task: Get quotes for a package weighing 10 lbs with dimensions of 2 inches in length, width, and height, being shipped from Long Beach, 90802 to Portland, 97201.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully reached the UPS Calculate Time and Cost page, entered the requested shipment details (Long Beach 90802 to Portland 97201, package dimensions 2x2x2 inches, weight 10 lbs), updated the quote, and the final page snapshot clearly showed the resulting rates. The evidence includes the final UPS results page showing packaging 'My Packaging' with 2 x 2 x 2 in and package weight 10 lbs, plus visible quote rows with prices and delivery estimates. The assistant’s reported quotes match the on-page results, including the duplicate Saturday/Monday variants for 3 Day Select and Ground.
final_result_response:
I got the UPS quotes for a 10 lb package, 2 x 2 x 2 in, from Long Beach, CA 90802 to Portland, OR 97201.

UPS used these defaults: commercial addresses, prepaid drop-off, ship date Wed May 13, 2026.

| Service | Delivery estimate | Cost |
|---|---:|---:|
| UPS Next Day Air Early | Thu May 14 by 8:00 AM | $251.44 |
| UPS Next Day Air | Thu May 14 by 10:30 AM | $211.99 |
| UPS Next Day Air Saver | Thu May 14 by end of day | $207.64 |
| UPS 2nd Day Air A.M. | Fri May 15 by 10:30 AM | $107.44 |
| UPS 2nd Day Air | Fri May 15 by end of day | $94.18 |
| UPS 3 Day Select, Saturday delivery | Sat May 16 by end of day | $69.23 |
| UPS Ground, Saturday delivery | Sat May 16 by end of day | $31.38 |
| UPS 3 Day Select | Mon May 18 by end of day | $63.97 |
| UPS Ground | Mon May 18 by end of day | $27.38 |

Billable weight shown by UPS: 10.0 lbs.
action_history: Opening UPS website: const upsPage1 = await openTab('https://www.ups.com/');
Opening UPS shipping menu: await page.locator('e102').click();
Opening UPS shipping menu: await page.locator('e8').click();
Closing cookie dialog and opening Shipping menu: await page.locator('e102').click();
Closing cookie dialog and opening Shipping menu: await page.locator('e8').click();
Dismissing cookie dialog: await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Close' }).click();
Opening UPS rate calculator directly: const upsRatePage1 = await openTab('https://www.ups.com/us/en/shipping/time-and-cost.page');
Opening UPS calculate time and cost app: const upsCtcPage1 = await openTab('https://wwwapps.ups.com/ctc/request?loc=en_US');
Entering shipment origin and destination: await page.locator('e7').fill('Long Beach');
Entering shipment origin and destination: await page.locator('e9').fill('90802');
Entering shipment origin and destination: await page.locator('e15').fill('Portland');
Entering shipment origin and destination: await page.locator('e17').fill('97201');
Entering shipment origin and destination: try { await page.locator('e23').click(); } catch (err) { console.log('destination type click failed: ' + err.message); }
Entering shipment origin and destination: await page.locator('e27').click();
Switching off UPS Simple Rate: await page.locator('e89').click();
Closing cookie notice: try { await page.locator('e69').click(); } catch (err) { console.log('ref close failed: '+err.message); }
Closing UPS cookie dialog: await page.locator('e69').click();
Closing UPS cookie dialog: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Switching from Simple Rate to package dimensions: await page.locator('e89').click();
Trying conventional package toggle: await page.locator('label[for="btnSimpleRate_Conventional"]').click({ force: true });
Scrolling to Simple Rate toggle and clicking Off: await page.mouse.click(toggleInfo2.x + toggleInfo2.w/2, toggleInfo2.y + toggleInfo2.h/2);
Entering package weight and dimensions: await page.locator('e137').fill('2');
Entering package weight and dimensions: await page.locator('e138').fill('2');
Entering package weight and dimensions: await page.locator('e139').fill('2');
Entering package weight and dimensions: await page.locator('e141').fill('10');
Updating UPS quote with package details: await page.locator('e119').click();
